arguments.argument: if atkProg=2 and atkTime>5 { playSound(global.snd_MarioBlockBreak,0,1,1) tEffect=instance_create(x+4,y-4,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sEfMarioBHit; tEffect.decay=10; tEffect.xSpd=1; tEffect.ySpd=-1 tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=5 tEffect=instance_create(x-4,y-4,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sEfMarioBHit; tEffect.decay=10; tEffect.xSpd=-1; tEffect.ySpd=-1 tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=5 tEffect=instance_create(x-4,y+4,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sEfMarioBHit; tEffect.decay=10; tEffect.xSpd=-1; tEffect.ySpd=1 tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=5 tEffect=instance_create(x+4,y+4,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sEfMarioBHit; tEffect.decay=10; tEffect.xSpd=1; tEffect.ySpd=1 tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=5 instance_destroy() }
